topics.title: Zero-based budgeting without spreadsheets
topics.angle: Explain how to assign every euro a job before the month starts, using a phone-first workflow instead of a complex spreadsheet.

topics.title: What to do when one category goes over budget
topics.angle: Teach a calm process for moving money between categories without losing sight of the monthly plan.

topics.title: A monthly budget reset routine that takes 20 minutes
topics.angle: Give readers a practical month-end routine for reviewing categories, carrying forward decisions, and starting clean.

topics.title: Why privacy matters in a budgeting app
topics.angle: Make the case for local-first budgeting tools without fearmongering or making unsupported security claims.

topics.title: Budgeting when your income changes each month
topics.angle: Show how to budget variable income conservatively by prioritising essentials, buffers, and savings goals.
